url.description: Clone URL for the remote repository
url.title: Url

dir.description: Local repository directory managed by nacre. The repository is cloned automatically if it does not exist.
dir.title: Dir

remotes.description: Named Git remotes used as the source of truth for declared branches. Every nacre run fetches these remotes before rebuilding declared branches.
remotes.title: Remotes

checkout.description: Declared branch name to check out after all declared branches have been refreshed from their remote sources.
checkout.title: Checkout

branches.description: Managed branch declarations. Each value must be 'remote:branch' or 'remote:branch@base'. On every run, nacre resets each declared branch to its remote source and optionally rebases it onto the declared base. Remote branches are the source of truth: push local work before re-running nacre if you want to keep it. Use undeclared local branches for temporary scratch work.
branches.title: Branches
